chain.expression:
$token_response = wp_remote_request( self::API_URL . '/get_token', [
			'method' => 'POST',
			'body' => [
				'app' => 'library',
				'grant_type' => 'authorization_code',
				'client_id' => Data::get_client_id(),
				'code' => isset( $_GET['code'] ) ? sanitize_text_field( wp_unslash( $_GET['code'] ) ) : null,
			],
		] )
